name: Honey Pecan Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak chicken pieces overnight in buttermilk (or at least several hours).
2. Mix flour, garlic powder, a little cayenne pepper, and pepper.
3. Dredge chicken in the flour mixture.
4. Let chicken rest after coating with flour mix for about 30 minutes (so the coating "sticks").
5. Heat a small amount of oil in a large frying pan.
6. Cook for about 8 minutes per side (boneless pieces require longer cooking; bone-in pieces require shorter cooking) until no longer pink.
7. Make Sauce: Mix melted butter or margarine, honey, lemon peel, and bourbon. Stir until warm.
8. Pour the sauce over cooked chicken.
9. Top with chopped pecans!
